name: powerpoint-bridge
description: Manipulate live, open PowerPoint presentations via Office.js — add shapes, text, images, and more to open presentations in real time.
long_description:
PowerPoint Bridge lets Claude control live, open PowerPoint presentations on macOS through Office.js APIs. Unlike file-based solutions, this extension manipulates the presentation in real time.

**Capabilities:**
- Add and modify shapes, text boxes, tables, and images
- Read slide structure and content
- Take visual screenshots of slides
- Copy slides between presentations
- Execute arbitrary Office.js code

**How it works:**
The extension runs a local bridge server that connects to a PowerPoint add-in via WebSocket. On first launch, the add-in is automatically installed into PowerPoint.

**Requirements:** Microsoft PowerPoint for Mac (16.96+), macOS.

tools.name: get_presentation
tools.description: Get the structure of a presentation (slides and shapes)

tools.name: get_slide
tools.description: Get detailed information about shapes on a specific slide

tools.name: get_slide_image
tools.description: Capture a slide as a PNG screenshot

tools.name: get_deck_overview
tools.description: Visual overview of all slides with thumbnails

tools.name: get_local_copy
tools.description: Export presentation to a local file path

tools.name: insert_image
tools.description: Insert an image onto a slide

tools.name: execute_officejs
tools.description: Execute arbitrary Office.js code in the live presentation
